  expiring_amcs: map(

    select(

      (.AMC_Status | ascii_downcase) == "active"

      and (

        (.AMC_End_Date | split("-") | .[2] + "-" + .[1] + "-" + .[0]) >= "2026-04-01"

      )

      and (

        (.AMC_End_Date | split("-") | .[2] + "-" + .[1] + "-" + .[0]) <= "2026-04-08"

      )

    )

  )

}

| .expiring_count = (.expiring_amcs | length)"}}]}}},{"name":"sample_response","value":{"type":"text_template","value":"[
